code: import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{BrowserRouter,Routes,Route,Navigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useSelector,useDispatch}from'react-redux';import{checkAuth}from'./api';import{loginSuccess,logout}from'./store/authSlice';import LoginPage from'./LoginPage';import MainPage from'./MainPage';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const isAuthenticated=useSelector(state=>state.auth.isAuthenticated);const loading=useSelector(state=>state.auth.loading);const dispatch=useDispatch();useEffect(()=>{const verifyAuth=async()=>{const authenticated=await checkAuth();if(authenticated){const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const username=localStorage.getItem('username');dispatch(loginSuccess({token,username}));}};verifyAuth();},[dispatch]);const handleLogin=()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const username=localStorage.getItem('username');dispatch(loginSuccess({token,username}));};const handleLogout=()=>{dispatch(logout());};if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading",children:"\u0417\u0430\u0433\u0440\u0443\u0437\u043A\u0430..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BrowserRouter,{basename:"/area-backend",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Routes,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/login",element:isAuthenticated?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/",replace:true}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LoginPage,{onLogin:handleLogin})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/",element:isAuthenticated?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MainPage,{onLogout:handleLogout}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/login",replace:true})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"*",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:isAuthenticated?"/":"/login",replace:true})})]})});}export default App;
